# Meeting Notes Template

Use this template to capture outcomes from recurring ceremonies and ad-hoc meetings. Store completed notes in the project repo or shared drive and link from the weekly status update.

---

## Meeting Notes — [Meeting Type] — [YYYY-MM-DD]

**Meeting Type:** Standup / Planning / Retrospective / Stakeholder Review / Ad-hoc
**Project:** [Project Name]
**Facilitator:** [Name]
**Note-taker:** [Name]
**Attendees:** [Names / Roles]
**Duration:** [e.g., 30 min]

---

## Agenda
1. Item 1
2. Item 2
3. Item 3

## Discussion Notes

### Agenda Item 1: [Title]
<!-- Key points discussed, decisions surfaced, questions raised -->

### Agenda Item 2: [Title]
<!-- Key points discussed -->

| Decision | Rationale | DRI | Date |
|----------|-----------|-----|------|
|          |           |     |      |

## Action Items
| Action | Owner (DRI) | Due Date | Status |
|--------|-------------|----------|--------|
|        |             |          | Open   |

> Carry open action items into the next meeting's agenda and into the project backlog where appropriate.

## Risks & Blockers Surfaced
| Risk / Blocker | Severity | Owner | Next Step |
|----------------|----------|-------|-----------|
|                |          |       |           |

> Escalate per the [Execution & Tracking escalation guidance](../octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md#blocker-escalation).
